description: The Clan Pariante is a Camorra criminal organization operating in the western suburbs of Naples, specifically in the municipalities of Bacoli and Monte di Procida. Founded by Rosario Pariante, it was originally part of the Di Lauro clan before splitting in 2004, triggering the First Scampia feud. The clan is involved in drug trafficking and extortion. As of 2017, the regent is Genny Pariante, son of Rosario.
